summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Crystal CLI tool and landing page design masterpiece. CLI functionality perfect with A (100/100) scores. Frontend design excellent with proper hero text sizing, 7 feature cards, 7 commands including crystal architect, and authentic terminal styling.

design_issues.issue: Browser tab shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'Crystal — Clean code that ships.'
design_issues.note: This appears to be a platform-level override by Emergent hosting and may not be fixable at application level

passed_tests: CLI: crystal check tests/fixtures/good_project returns A (100/100)
CLI: crystal architect generates architecture.md successfully
CLI: crystal check . returns A (100/100) for self-check
CLI: All 5 CLI commands work correctly
Frontend: Hero line 1 shows 'Crystal' in massive text (160px)
Frontend: Hero line 2 shows 'Clean code that ships.' in bold (44px)
Frontend: Hero line 3 shows full descriptor text in readable size (21.6px)
Frontend: Features section displays 7 cards with readable titles
Frontend: Commands table shows 7 commands including 'crystal architect'
Frontend: Footer contains 'Build with AI. Ship with Crystal.'
Frontend: Terminal blocks have authentic macOS dots (red, yellow, green)
Frontend: All text is readable with proper contrast on dark background
Frontend: Responsive design with proper font sizing
action_item_for_main_agent: Page title issue is likely a platform-level override by Emergent hosting. The HTML title is correctly set but being overridden. This may not be fixable at the application level.
